pericopes.title: Sakei bahkai hong sunga Daniel kilelut
Daniel’in Themgao thilmua Kelngoichal le Kelchal amu
Tigris vadung panga Daniel’in Themgao thilmua thil amu

chapters.text: Judah gam lengpa Jehoi’akim lengvaipoh kal kum thum lhin kumin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa chu ahung konin Jerusalem khopi ahung umtai.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin Judah gam lengpa Jehoi’akim le Pathen houin sunga khon phabep chu Nebuchadnez’zar khut’a apedoh tai; Nebuchadnez’zar hin Jehoi’akim ahin kaiyin, khon ho chu Shinar gamsunga ahinpo lut’in, adoi houna insunga alhut’in, khon jouse chu adoi houna insunga thil kholna a akoitai.
Chujouvin lengpan jong asepai nukisoho lah a lamkai pipupen Ash’penaz kitipa jah a chun Israel mite lah a leng insung mite lah a kon leh milen milalte lah a kona mi phabep ahinpui lut din aseipeh-e;

hikoma adei mi chu gollhang jeng hiya nolnabei mi hiding, atahsa hoitah, chihna nei mi, hetna bukimsoh, thepna dol’a thil hetkhenje them, leng inpia goi dinga jong lolhing thei mi, chule amaho chu Chalde’a mite lekha hil’a apaovu jong hilthem ding ati ahi.

Hitobang miho chu lengpan niseh a an tuitah tah apeh a ama neh bang bang anehsah ahin, chujongleh aman adon tobang bang ju jong adonsahji ahi. Amaho hi kum thum sunga thepna kihil diu, kum thum akichai tengleh abonchauva lengpa angsunga ding cheh diu ahi.
Hiche gollhang ho lah a hin Daniel le Hanani’ah Mish’a-el, chule Judah phunga mi Azari’ah jong apang khauve.
Nukiso ho lah a lamkai pipupan amaho hi aminu asempeh-in, Daniel chu Belteshaz’zar asah-in, Hanani’ah chu Shadrach asah-in, Mish’a-el chu Meshach asah-in, chule Azari’ah chu Abed’nego asah-e.

Daniel chun lengpa anneh tuitah tah neh a kisuhboh louna ding leh ju adonji chu dona kisuhboh louna dingin apang tai; hijeh chun Daniel’in jong hitobang anneh le ju dona ama le ama akisuhboh louna din nukiso ho lamkaipa henga athumtai.
Hichea hin nukiso ho lamkai pipupa mitmun Pathenin Daniel chunga hin lung lhaina le voujang natpina apetai.

Hijeh chun nukiso ho lamkai pipun jong Daniel jah a aseipeh-in, “Ajo le nang ho neh ding le don ding gonga pang kapu lengpan nakum kibahpi nagol ho sanga natahsa gongjoa namuna khat um get’in tin hinte, tin kati ajai. Chutileh nang hin kalubuh lengpa natan sah lo ding ahi.” atitai.
Hichun Daniel’in jong nukiso ho lamkai pipupan Daniel le Hanani’ah, Mish’a-el, chule Azari’ah ching dia apansah pa jah a chun aseiyin.
“Nasohte keiho hi nisom sungin neipatep’un kaneh diuvin anche bou neipeuvin lang kadon diu twi keoseh neipeuvin.

Chujou tengleh keiho maiso melput le lengpa anneh tuitah tah neho gollhang dang ho khutoh amaisou amelput’u neivet kah tem’uvin; hichea chu namu bang bangin neibol jengun, nasohten khoh kasapouve, ati.“
Hijeh chun aman jong aseiyu anop peh-in, hiche thudol’a chun nisom sungin amaho chu ave patep tai.
Nisom lhin nin amaho chu antui tuiya kivah gollhang ho sangin jong amaisou ahoijon, atahsau jong athaojoi, tin akimudoh tai.
Chuphat’in amaho chinga pang pan jong aneh diuva kigong antui tah tah le adon diu ju chu akoidoh in, aneh diu anche bou apetai.

Hicheng gollha’ng li Daniel le agolte chu Pathenin thepna apen, lekha jouse athem’uvin, chihna ijakai jong abukip sah tai; Daniel chun themgao thilmu hetkhenna jong thepna aneiyin, mang letheina jong athemdoh tai.
Aphat alhin’a lengpan gollhang ho chu hinpuilut tauvin, tia thu apeh phat chun, nukiso ho lamkai pipupan jong gollhang ho chu Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa angsunga apuilut tai.
Lengpan amaho chu akihoupin ahileh alah-uva chun koimacha dang Daniel le Hanani’ah, Mish’a-el chule Azari’ah tobang akimudoh jou tapoi. Hijeh chun amaho li chu lengpa angsunga ading tauve.

Chihna thudol le thil hetkhen them thudol’a lengpan amaho adohna chung chang jousea, amaho hi alenggam sunga mitpheldoi themho le ailhim themho sangin ajat som jenin aching jouvin athem jouve, ti lengpan amudoh tai.
Daniel chu Cyrus lengpa leng chan kal kum khat lhin geiyin apangtai.
Nebuchadnez’zar leng chan kal kum ni lhin kumin Nebuchadnez’zar chun mang phabep aneiye; hichea hin alung agim lheh jengin, ihmu mo hel’in aumtai.

Chuphat’in lengpan jong mitpheldoi them ho le ailhim themho, doithemho, chule ahsi lekha themho kouva lengpa mang chu alepeh diuvin thu apetai. Hijeh chun amaho jong ahunguvin lengpa angsunga adingsoh tauve.
Lengpan amaho jah a aseiyin, “Ken mang khat kaneiyin, hiche mang hi ipi kiseina hi ding hitam ti kahetnom in kalung agim lheh jenge,” ati,
Hichun ahsi lekha themhon lengpa jah a aseiyun, “Vo lengpa, hingsot’ in! Namang chu nasohte hi neiseipeh leu chun keihon naledohpeh tauvinge,” atiuve.

Lengpan ahsi lekha themho chu adonbut’in, “Keiman kaseidohsa hi thon ngailou ahi; nang hon hiche kamang hi naseidoh lou uva, chule ipi kiseina ham, tijong naledoh thei lou uleh, natahsau ahal hal’a kiheh goi ding, kibottel soh ding, chule na-in jouseu jong kiphe lha in-gem jenga kikoi ding ahi.

Amavang kamang chu naseidohuva ipi kiseina ham, tijong naledoh theiyuva ahileh nang hon kakoma kona thilpeh jong nakilah-uva, kipaman jong nakisan diu, minphatna lentah jong namu diu ahi. Hijeh chun kamang chu seidohuvin lang, ipi kiseina ham ledoh tem’uvin,” atitai.
Anivei lhin nan amahon adonbut kit leuvun, “Lengpan namang chu nasohte jah a seidoh masan lang keihon naledohpeh nauvinge,” atiuve.
Hichun lengpan jong, “Ken phatah a kahet ahitai, nang ho hin phatsot sotna ding nagel’u ahitai; ajeh chu ken kaseisa hi thon ngailou ahi, ti naheuvin,

nang hon kamang chu naseidoh lou pou pouvuva ahileh nang ho din thutansa khatseh bou umah ahitai. Phat le nikho kikhel kah a nang hon ka-angsunga jou seiya thu chavaiya lhep lhah ding neigot’u ahi. Hijeh chun kamang chu seidoh masa leu chun aledohje jong nahet diu ahi, ti keiman kahetdoh ding ahibouve,” ati kit tai.

Ahsi lekha themhon lengpa chu abonbut kit leuvun, “Lengpan nadei bolthei ding chu leiset chunga mihem khatcha jong aumpoi; ajeh chu leng len len ho le thanei tah tah hon jong hitobang thudoh kiti hi mitpheldoi them hihen ailhim them hileh, ahsi lekha them hijongleh adoh khah ngailou ahibouve.
Lengpa thildoh hi thil hahsa ahi, tahsaa hing hilou pathen kiti ho tilouvin, koiman hitobang thil hi lengpa dia aseidoh thei louhel ding ahibouve,” atisoh keitauve.
Hitia aseijeh-u hin lengpa jong alung hang behseh jengin Babylon gamsunga miching mithem jouse suhgam dingin thu alhuh sah tai.
Hiti hin miching mithemho thagamna ding thupeh chu akithot doh tan, mihon Daniel le agolte jong tha din ahung holtauve.
Hichea hin Babylon gamsunga miching mithemho that gam dia kondoh lengpa sepaite lamkaiya pang Ar’i-och kitipa chu Daniel’in jong lungthim ching thei tah leh geltoh chet’in ana donbut’in ahi;

Ar’i-och kiti lengpa sepai lamkaipa jah a chun Daniel chun aseitai, “Ipi dinga lengpan hitobang loma thupeh nasa apeh jeng hitam?” atileh; athudol jouse Ar’i-och chun Daniel aseipeh-in ahet chetsah tai.
Chuphat’in Daniel jong lengpa henga avah lut jengin, lengpa mang chu aledoh theina dinga phat chom khat anga din agataotai.
Daniel jong ainlama achen athudol chu agolte ho Hanani’ah le Mish’a-el toh chule Azari’ah jah a agasei tai;
chujongleh hiche thil kiselguh aki-im thudola hi van Pathen hepina athum’uva, Daniel le agolte chule Babylon gamsunga miching mithem jouse amanthah louna diuvin jong aseipeh tai.
Chujouvin janlaiyin hiche thil ki-im kiselguh hi Daniel’in themgao thilmua amuna a ahung kiphongdoh tai.
Hichun Daniel’in van Pathen achoi-an tai. Daniel’ in hi tin aseiye: “Tonsot tonsot geiyin Pathen min nun nom hen, Chihna le thahatna kiti chu Pathena bou ahi.
Pathenin phat le nikho akhel’in kum kiheichin aumsah-e; Pathenin leng ho jong ahaisah a pan jong apansah ahi; Miching ho chihna jong Pathen peh ahin, Thil hetkhenna neiho jong hetna apeh ahi.
Pathenin thuh tah tah a kisel Aki-im mangsa thil ho jong aphongdoh jin, Muthim khojing lah a thil umjong ahen, Khovah chu amato kikhenlou ahi.

Vo kapu kapate Pathen Nangma kathangvah-in kavahchoiye; Ajeh chu nangin chihna le thahat neipen, Chule nahenga kithum chu keijah a naseitai; Hitobang hin nangin lengpa thusei chu Keiho henga neihetsah tauve,” ati.

Hichun Daniel jong Babylon gamsunga lengpan miching mithem jouse sumang dia apansah Ar’i-och henga agalut’in, akoma agachen ajah a hitin agaseiye. “Babylon gamsunga miching mi themte chu sumang hih-in, lengpa angsunga keima neipuilut ta din, chuteng keim’an lengpa mang ledohna chu seipeh nange,” ati.

Chutah chun Ar’i-och kitipan jong kin loiyin Daniel chu lengpa angsunga apuilut pai jengin ajah a hi tin aseitai, “Judah gamsunga soh chang ho lah a keiman mi khat kamudoh-in, ama hin lengpa henga namang ledohna naseipeh thei ding ahi,” agati.
Chuin lengpan jong amin Belteshaz’zar kisahpa Daniel jah a chun aseiyin, “Nangin kakoma kamang kamusa chu naseidoh theiya chule ipi kiseina ham tijong naledoh thei ding hinam?” atileh;

Daniel’in jong lengpa chu adonbut’in, “Miching mithem koi hihen lang, ailhim them koi itobang hileh, mitpheldoi themho hihen ahsi lekha themho hijongleh, lengpan nadoh hiche thil kiim kisel guh hi nasei doh peh jou mihem koimacha aseidoh jou ding aumpoi;

amavang vana Pathen khatseh achengin aman hitobang thil ki-im kiselguh ho hi aphongdoh jie; hiche Pathen hin Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa henga khonunga hungsoh ding thil a phondoh ahitai. Jalkhuna nalup pet’a mang naneiya nalu-lhun koma themgao thilmu bang namu chu hiche hi ahi.

Vo lengpa, jalkhuna nalup pet chun khonunga thil ipi hungsoh ding ham, tin nangman lung tampi nageltai; hijeh a chu thilguh kisel ki-im phongdohji Pathenin ahungsoh ding thil chu nahenga ahin phondoh ahitai.

Kei thudol’in vang mihing hijat sanga chihna kaneijeh ham khat’a hiche thil ki-im kiselguh hi kahenga hung kiphongdoh ahipoi, amavang ipi kiseina ahichu lengpa henga akiseidoh theiya, chutengleh nangin jong nalung gil’a nagel chengse chu nahet dohna dia hung kiphongdoh joh ahibouve.
“Vo lengpa, vetan, nangman milim lentah khat namui. Hiche milim chu anasan, avah pem pum jengin, na-ang sunga ahung dinge; alimso dan chu kichat aum lheh jenge.
Aluchang chu sana thengsel hoitah ahin, a-omlhang le abanjang te ni dangka jeng ahin, aoipoh le akheldung sum-eng jeng ahin.
akeng teni thih ahin, chule akengphang teni chu thih le leiset kihal tong tobang ahi.
Nangin nagah vet’a ahileh mihem khut’a kisui kikhengjol hilou songtum khat hin milim chu akengphang teni thih le leiset kihal tong tobang laitah chu ahinsep’in, akengphang teni chu asep keh hel tai;

chuphat’in thih jong, leiset jong, sum-eng jong, dangka jong, chule sana gei geiyin akehsoh hel’in, akikhensoh keiyun, ahal hal’in alhauvin, nipi laiya changphol’a changsi kithe mang to bang ahitauve; abonchauvin huiyin alhoh mangsoh hel’in, analsi khatjeng cha jong akimudoh jou tapoi. Ahinla milim sepkeh a pang songtum chu molsang lentah-in ahung kikhangdoh-in, leiset pumpi adimset tai.
Namang chu hiche hi ahi: ipi kiseina ham, ti lengpa jah a kaseipeh diu ahi.“
Vo lengpa, nang hi leng jouse leng nahin, van Pathen chun nang hi lenggam jong, thaneina jong, thahatna jong chule loupina jong napeh ahitai:

chujongleh nangma khut’a hi van Pathen chun mihem chate hi hoikoma chengu jongleh napeh a, gamlah a gamsa jouse napeh a, chunga leng vacha jouse napeh a, hicheng chunga hi nangma vaihoma napansah a um nahin, milim luchang sana laitah chu nangma nahi.

Nangma khang akichai tengleh nanunga nang sanga lhasam jep lenggam khat hung kitungdoh a, chujou tengleh lenggam thum lhinna hungdoh kit ding, hichu sum-eng kiti lai chu ahin, hiche lenggam hin leiset pumpi chunga vai ahom ding ahi.

Thih hin thil ijakai asuhboh a ahalsi sia ajam thei banga, thih tobanga hat lenggam li lhinna jong hung umdoh kit ding ahi; thih-in thil asat goi sel banga hiche lenggam hin hichengse hi avohcheh-a asattel ding ahi.

Chule nangin namu banga chu milim kengphang teni le akhojung dung ho chu abang bang bel dengpan leiset asem tobang hiya, abang bang thih hi yah ahin, hiche lenggam chu a bung bunga hung kikhen ding ahi; ahivanga chu abang bang chu thih ahibanga ahat tah tah jong um diu ahi, nangman thih le bonlhoh leiset kihal namu banga chu.
Akengphang te nia akhojung ho abang bang thih ahiya, abang bang leiset ahibanga chu hiche lenggam hi ahat le ahatlou kihal khopset ding ahi.

Nangman thih chu bonlhoh leiset to kihal jeng jung namu banga hiche khang mite chu kichengtouva kihal jeng jung diu ahi; ahivangala det chet’a kikan khom thei louhel diu ahiye. ajeh chu thih hi leiset toh det tah a kikan mat thei lou ahibouve.

Hitobang lenggam kihal jeng jung khanga leng ho khang phat hileh van Pathenin lenggam khat ahin tundoh ding ahin, hiche lenggam chu kisumang kit louhel ding ahitai. chujongleh alengvaipoh thaneina jong nam dang khat kidalhah peh lou ding ahi. Hiche lenggam hin ajoa kisei lenggam dang jouse chu avoh chehsoh keiya asuh beihel ding, achangseh a hiche lenggam vang chu atonsot geiya dingdet jing ding ahi;0..0

nangman songtum molvuma kona mihem khut’a kikaldoh louhcl khat namua, songtum chun thih jong asegoiya, sum-eng jong asegoiya, leiset jong asethang soh a, dangka le sana geiya asetsoh hel banga chu umdoh ding ahi. Khonunga hungsoh ding chu Pathen loupi tah chun lengpa henga ahetsah ahitai. Namang hi atahbeh ahin, thon louva soh tei ding, chule akiledohna jong thon moa soh ding ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa jong akunin tol’a amai asulut jengin, Daniel chu chibai aboh jengin, Daniel chu gantha a chule gimnamtui lhutnama hou din thu alhuhsah tai.

Chujongleh lengpan Daniel jah a chun aseiyin, “Tahbeh mongin nangma Pathen hi pathen jouse Pathen ahin, leng ho jouse Pakai ahi; chujongle ama hi thil ki-im kiselguh phongdoh Pathen jong ahi, ajeh chu nangman hiche thil ki-im kiselguh chu naphongdoh thei jenge,” atitai.

Chutah chun lengpan jong Daniel chu nasatah tah-in ajabol’in, thilpeh loupi tah tah tampi apen, Babylon gamkai pumpia vaihomin apansah-in, Babylon gamsunga miching mithem jouse chunga achamkim pen le lamkai pi pun apansah tai.

Daniel’in jong lengpa henga athumin, hijeh chun lengpan Babylon gamsung pumpi ima ma thudola pang din Shadrach le Meshach toh, Abed’nego chu alhengtai. Daniel vang chu lengpa inpi sunga apang den tai.
Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan sanan milim khat asemin, milim chu asan dan tong somgup alhingin, availam tong gup alhinge. Babylon gamsunga Dura kiti phaichama hiche milim chu atungdoh tai.

Chuin Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan mi asol’in Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan atundoh milim katdoh kut’a pang din vaihom thuneiho, miching mithemte lamkaiho, gamvaipo ho, leng thumop’a pang ho, neiching ho, thutan vaihom len loi, thutana pang ho, gamsung pumpia vaibol’a pang jouse abonchan agakhop sah tai.

Hijeh chun vaihom thuneiho jong, miching mithemte lamkaiho jong, gamvaipo ho jong, leng thumop’a pang ho jong, neiching ho jong, thutan vaihom len loi jong, thutana pang ho jong, chule gamsung pumpia vaibol’a pang jouse abonchauvin Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan atundoh milim katdohna kut’a chun akikhomsoh keitauve. Mipi chu Nebuchadnez’zar milim tundoh maiya chun ading soh keiyun ahi.
Chuin lhangsama pang hon lhang asam’uvin, “Vo mitin vaipi, namtin vaipia kon, paotin paotang mite nang ho hi thu kipe nahiuve,

nang hon saki kimut gin le theile gin, semjang kisai gin, gosem gin, selangdah gin, baja gin chule tumging kiti jouse gin najah tengu leh naboh khup soh keiyuva, Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa milim tundoh hi chibai naboh soh kei diu ahi;
hichea hi koi koi hijeng jongleh boh khup’a chibai boh lou jouse chu apet pet’a meilhum kongje ju sunga kileh lut jeng ding ahi,” atiuve.

Hiti hin mitin vaipi chun saki kimut gin le theile gin, semjang kisai gin, gosem gin, selangdah gin, baja gin le tumging thei kiti jouse gin ajah phat’uvin mitin vaipi abonchauvin namtin vaipia kon, paotin paotang mite chu aboh khup soh keiyun Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa milim tundoh sanaa kisem chu chibai abohsoh keitauve.
Hiche pet hin Chaldea mite phabep ahunguvin melse tah-in Judah mite chu ahung hehseuve.
Amahon Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa jah a chun aseiyun, “Vo lengpa hingsot’in!

Vo lengpa, nangin thugahna khat nasemin, mihem koi koi hijeng jongleh saki kimut ging, theile gin, semjang kisai gin, gosem gin, selangdah gin, baja gin chule tumging thei kiti jouse gin ajah tengleh boh khup cheh a milim sana kisem chu chibai aboh cheh ding ahi;
koi hijeng jongleh boh khup’a chibai boh lou tapou chu meilhum kongje ju sunga selut jeng ding ahi, nati.

Ahinla Judah mite phabep aum’uvin, amaho hi nangin Babylon gamsung pumpi thusoh ijakai vetup dinga napansah ahiuvin, amaho hi Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego ahiuve. Vo lengpa, mi hicheng hin nathusei ngaisah-in aneipouve; amahon nahou doi kisemthu hi akinbol agopouvin, nangin natundoh hiche sana kisem milim jong hi chibai aboh deh pouve,” tin aheh tauve.
Chutah chun Nebuchadnez’zar jong alung hang behseh jengin, Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego chu mat’a kailut loi din thu apetai. Hijeh chun hiche miho hi lengpa angsunga ahin kailut tauve.
Nebuchadnez’zer chun amaho adongin, “Vo Shadrach le Meshach chule Abed’nego, nang ho hin keima doihou ho jong akin abol pouvin, sana kisem milim katundoh jong hi chibai aboh pouve, kiti hi dih nam?

Nanghon saki kimut ging, theile gin, semjang kisai gin, gosem gin, selangdah gin, baja gin chule tumging thei jouse kimut gin chu najah-uva boh khup cheh a keima semsa milim chu chibai boh dinga kigosa nahiuva ahileh aphan ahoiye; amavang chibai naboh louvu ahileh apet pet’a meilhum kongje ju sunga nakileh lut jeng diu ahi; hichea hi kei khut’a kona nahuhdoh theiyu Pathen itobang um am?” atitai.
Shadrach le Meshach chule Abed’nego kiti hon lengpa chu adonbut’uvin, “Vo Nebuchadnez’zar, hiche thudol’a hi keihon nang kadonbut louvu akhoh poi.
Hitia hi neibol diuva ahileh keihon kahouvu ka-Pathenu chun kichat umtah meilhum deuje ju sunga kona chu eihuhdoh diu ahinai; vo lengpa, hiche Pathen chun nangma khut’a konin eihuhdoh nauvin te.
Hichea hin eihuhdoh hih beh jengu jongleh kihet them’in lengpa, keihon nangma doi semthu ho kahoupeh lou diu, hiche sana milim natundoh jong hi chibai kaboh louhel diu ahi,” atiuve.

Hichun Nebuchadnez’zar jong alungsa behseh jengin, Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego vetda nan amaiso jong akikhel hel jeng tai. Hijeh chun meilhum kongje ju chu asat ngaibep’a sang chun ajat sagi vei jena sacheh din atiphat sah tai.
Chuin asepaite lah a mi thahat cheh phabep chu asol’in, Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego chu akan’uva meilhum sunga akongje ju laiya alelut diuvin thu apetai.
Hijeh chun amaho chu aponsil jouseuvin akan’uvin, asangkhol chol’u le alukhuh jouseuvin jong, aponsil’u adang dangin jong akan’un meilhum deuje ju lah a chun asep lut tauve.
Lengpa thupeh chu gah teh ahin, meilhum sung jong asat’a sa ahi; hijeh chun meikongin Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego meilhum sunga sep lut ho geiyin aleolih den tai.
Ahinla hicheng mi thum ho Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego kiti ho chu meilhum sung kongje ju lah a akikan nau pumin alhalut jel’uvin ahi.

Chuphat’in lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar jong alung dong behseh jengin kin le bongin ahung dingdoh jenge. Lengpan ama thumop’a pangji ho jah a chun aseitai, “Mi thum ho chu kikana meilhum sunga iselut’u hilou ham?” atileh; amahon jong adonbut’uvin, “Vo lengpa, ahinai,” atiuve.

Ahin lengpan ahou pai kit’in, “Ahile meilhum sung laitah a mi li kilhamsa kijot le leuva meiyin akah louhel kamu khu men; alah-uva mi li lhinnapa chu amelput dan jong pathente chapa tobanga khu,” ati.

Hichun Nebuchadnez’zar jong meilhum sung kongje jua kitih kotphung koma chun ahungin akoutai, “Pathen chungnungpen lhacha ho, Shadrach, Meshach chule Abed’nego hung potdoh loiyun lang hikoma hunguvin!” agati. Chuphat’in Shadrach le Meshach toh chule Abed’nego chu meilhum sunga konin ahung potdoh tauve.

Chuin vaihom thuneiho le miching mithemte lamkaiho, gamvaipo ho, chule lengpa thumop a pang ho loi chu ahung kikhomsoh keiyun hicheng mi thum ho chunga hin meikong chun tha aneipoi, ima cha alothei lou ahi, ti amudoh-uvin, alujang samu jong ahalvam poi, aponsil’u jong akapoi, mei nama mei nam jeng cha jong achunguva akijapoi, ti kichenin amudoh tauve.

Hichun Nebuchadnez’zar kitipan jong aseiyin, “Shadrach le Meshach chule Abed’nego Pathen chu nun nom hen, aman a-Vantil ahinsol’in, ama chunga kingai jing alhacha miho ahuhdoh sah-in, amaho Pathen tailou pathen lim semthu hou sanga atahsau tohdoh jenga lengpa thupeh geiya nahsah moa bol alhachate chu ahuhdoh sah tai.

Hichejeh hin keiman kigahna khat kaseme: Koi mi hihen koi jat koi nam hijongleh, ipi paovin pao jongleh Shadrach le Meshach chule Abed’nego Pathen douna ikhat khat sei kha tapou chu atahsa ahal hal’a kibottel jeng ding, ain’u kiphe lhaa in-gema kijam ding ahi; ajeh chu hitobanga mi huhdoh thei ding hi pathen dang aumpoi,” ati.
Chujongleh lengpan Shadrach le Meshach chule Abed’nego chu Babylon gamsunga vaipoa apan nauva konin apanmun’u akalsah be kit tai.
Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan leiset pumpi chunga cheng mitin vaipi le namtin vaipi jouse, chule paotin tang henga nachunguva chamna leng hen pung thei hen!
Kei din Hatchungnung Pathenin kahenga aphondoh thil kidang ho le melchihna chengse hi phondoh son ding pha leh akilom tai.
Pathenin melchihna abol ho itobanga nasa hitam, Thil kidang abol ho jong itobanga thanei hi tam! Ama lenggam chu tonsot’a um jing lenggam ahin, Alengvai neina jong akhang khanga umjing ahi.
Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa keima hi ka-insunga nomsa tah-in kachengin, kaleng in pia nei le gou lhingset’in kachenge.

Hichun mang khat kaneiyin, kamang chun eilungdon sah lheh jenge; hijeh chun jalkhuna kalup nah vangin kalu lhuna themgao thilmu tobanga thil kamu ho, kamit kamaiya kilang jing tobang chun eihoh kicha jinge.
Chuphat’in kenjong Babylon gamsunga miching mithem ho chu abonchauva kahenga ahinpui lut’uva, amaho hin kamang chu ipi kiseina hiding ham, ti eiseidoh pehna diuvin thu kalhahsah tai.

Hijeh chun mitpheldoi them ho leh ailhim themho, Chaldea mite leh ahsi lekha them ho ahung soh keiyun, kenjong ajah-uva kamang chu kaseipeh-in, ahivangin amahon ipi kiseina hiding ham, ti eiseipeh theipouve.

Achaina keiyin Daniel chu kahenga ahungin, Daniel jong keima hou doi khat min kiputsah a Belteshaz’zar kisah ahi, hiche Daniel kitipa chunga hin Pathen Theng Lhagao achengin, hijeh chun kenjong kamang chu Daniel jah a kaseiyin hitin kati,

“Vo mitpheldoi them ho lamkai pipu Belteshaz’zar, keiman Pathen Theng Lhagao nachunga achengin, nang din thil kiselguh ki-im imacha jong het hahsa aumpoi, ti kahet ahi, ngaiyin keiman mang kanei chu hiche hi ahi; ipi kiseina hiding ham neiseipeh temin.
Jalkhuna kalup pet’a kalu lhuna themgao thilmu banga kamu chu hicheng hi ahi: vetan, leiset lailung tah a keiman thing phung khat kamun, athing phung chu asang lheh jenge.
Thing phung chu akhang khangin akeh det lheh jeng tai, ajih-in jong van aphan, hijeh chun leiset monga pat’in jong akimu thei soh keiye.

Thingphung chu ana ahoi theiyin, aga jong abulhing theiye; hiche thingphunga hin mitin neh thei aumsoh keiyin ahi. Gamlah a gamsa jouse jong alim noiya akol’un, chunga leng vacha jouse jong a bah dunga achenguve, hiti hin tahsaa hing jouse hiche thing phunga kon hin akivah-uvin ahi.
Jalkhuna kalup pet’ a themgao thilmu tobanga thil kamuna dunga chun vetan, Vantil Theng gam ngah a pang khat vana konin ahung kum lhai.“

Vantil chun lhang asamin hitin aseiye, Thing phung khu phuh lhu’uvin lang, abah jouse tan lhauvin, ana jouse jong malngim soh keiyun lang chule aga jong the thangsoh tauvin; aphung noi lima geh gamsa jouse jam mangsoh keiyu hen, abah dunga geh vacha jouse jong leng mangsoh hen.

Amavang thingphung bul ajung bulbal chu lei noiya umsah den’uvin, thih khao tampi le sum-engin kan chah kheh-uvin, tol’a hamhing nemjil jel lah a chun dalhauvin. Hiche kungbul chu vana hung lha daitwiyin chap nou jing jeng hen lang, leiset hamhing lah a lhale gamsa hon kitajao nan neiyu hen.
Chule akungbul chu mihem lungthim aputna konin sahem lungthimin kikheldoh hen lang, hiti hin kum sagi jen dou hen.

Hiche thugahna hi gam ngah-a pang hon asem’u ahin, Vantil Theng hon kihou lhuhna aneiyu ahi, hitia chu phat akichai tengleh mihing jousen ahet diu chu, Hatchungnung Pathenin mihem lenggam jouse chunga vai ahomin, chule lenggam alungdei deipa apetheiye, chujongleh mihem lah a mi noinungpen jong lenggam chu apejle, ti aheidoh thei diu ahi,’ ati.

Leng Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa keiman hiche mang kamat’in ahi. Vo Belteshaz’zar, nangman hiche hi ipi kiseina ham, phongdoh temin, ajeh chu kalenggam sunga miching mithem jousen ipi kiseina ahiding eiseipeh thei louvu ahitai; amavang nangin nasei thei ahi, ajeh chu Pathen Theng Lhagao nachunga achenge,” katitai.

Hichun Belteshaz’zar kisah pa Daniel chu chomkhat alung dongin, alung gel jouse akichi-ah lah jeng tai. Ahinla lengpan jong aseiyin, “Belteshaz’zar, hiche mang hi akiledohna ding chu nalung gel kichi-ah sah dan,” atileh; Belteshaz’zar jong chun adonbut’in, “Kapu, hiche mang hi nakihotpi ho mang hihen lang, chule akiledohna jong chu namelmate chan ding hitave leh!
Hiche manga thing phung namu, hung khangdoh a dettah a keh det, ajih jong van geiya kitungdoh a, van mang kol kim vel’a kona kimu thei soh kei thingphung,

ana jouse hoi thei lheh jenga, aga jong lolhingset, athing phunga kona mitin kivahna kham neh ding lhingset; aphung noi lima gamlah a gamsa jouse geh theiya, abah dung jousea jong chung leng vacha jouse cheng thei thingphung namu chu,

nangma nahi. Vo lengpa, thingphung banga chu hung khangdoh a dettah a cheng det nahitai. Naloupina hi khang khanga van aphah ahitan, nalengvai neina jong hin leiset mong kol kimvel akho khongsoh ahitai.

Chujongleh lengpan gam ngah-a pang Vantil Theng khat vana kona hung kumlha namua, hitia aseiya, ‘Thing phung hi phuh lhu’uvin lang sumang uvin, amavang lei noiya abulbal ajungseh seh khen’uvin, thih khao lom le sum-engin kanchah uvin lang tol’a hampa nem lah a chun dalhauvin; chule vana kona hung daitwiyin chap kotji ji hen, kum sagi sungin gamlah a gamsa hon kitajao nan neiyu hen,’ ati chu:
hiche hi aledohna ahi. Vo lengpa, hiche Hatchungnung Pathen thutan kigahna ahin, kapu lengpa nang chunga hung lhung ding ahi;

nang hi mihem chenna lah a kona nakidel manga, gamlah a gamsate toh nachen khom ding; hichea chu bongchal banga hamhing naneh a, vana kona hung lha daitwi nadouva nachet ding, kum sagi sunga hitia hi nadouva, Hatchungnung Pathenin mihem lenggam chunga vai ahomin, alenggam jeng jong hi Apeh nom nompa apeh jeng ahibouve, ti nahetdoh kahsea hitia chu naum ding ahi.
Chule thingphung chu ajung bulbal kungbul keoseh khenden dia thu akipeh banga, nalenggam jong hi nangman van Pathenin vai ahome, ti nahetdoh tih tih leh hung dingdoh kit ding ahinai.

Hijeh chun vo lengpa, keiman kathumop hi santhei lomin gel’in lang, adih jengin chonin nachonset pailhan, bolgentheiya umte khu hepin lang nathemmona jouse jong paidoh tan, chutileh chamle lung monga naumna hi phat sotjep’a jong nabolpeh thei mai ding ahi,” ati.
Lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar chunga thil hijatpi hi hungsoh ahi.
Lha som le lha ni nungin Nebuchadnez’zar chu Babylon gama aleng inpi inchunga avah len,
hichea hin lengpan aseitai, “Hiche Babylon loupi, keiman kathahat’a kasah doh, leng insung mite chenna ding leh kalal loupi minthanna dinga kaboldoh chu hi lou ham?” tin a-aojah jenge.
Lengpan hoithona thu aseiho chu asei chaisoh hih laiyin, vana konin o-khat ahung gingin, “Vo lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar nahenga hiche thu hi kisei ahi: Lenggam hi nakilahpeh ahitai.

nang jong mihem lah a kona nakidel mang ding, gamlah a gamsa ho khutoh nachen khom ding, bongchal banga nangin hamhing neneh a, mihemte lenggam chunga hin Hatchungnung Pathenin vai ahomin, lenggam jeng jong apehnom nompa apei, ti nahetdoh kahsea, kum sagi sunga hitobang hi nadou ding ahi,” ahinti.

Asei jou jouvin thu kisei chu Nebuchadnez’zar chunga aguilhung paiyin; ama chu mihem lah a konin akidel mangin, bongchal bangin hamhing anetai; alujang sam jouse muvanlai mul chan chenga asaodoh kahsen, vana hung lha daitwi adou dou jengin, atahsa akot jing jenge; a tin ho jeng jong mu-tin tobangin asaotai.

Kathoh nikho akichai ding phat’in Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa keiman van lam kaven ahileh kalung ahung limdoh tan, chuin Hatchungnung Pathen kachoi-anin, atonsot atonsot’a hing jing Pathen chu kavahchoiyin jatah-in kaboltai. Ajeh chu Pathen lengvai neina hi Tonsot geiya lengvai neina ahin, Alenggam jengin jong Akhang khanga adoujou jing jeng ahi;

Leiset pumpia cheng mihem jouse jong Imacha kisim lou ahibouvui: Hiche Pathen hin van loupina lah ajong Alungdei deiya thil abolji ahin, Leiset’a chengte lah-a jong Alungdei deiya thil abolji ahiye; Koimachan akhut atuh tang jou lou ding, Ajah a jong, “Ipi nabol ham?” atithei lou ding ahi.

Aphat akichai phat’in kalung gel ahung limdoh-in, kalenggam loupina le kalal loupina, kaminthanna abonchan kahin geldoh kit tai. Keima thumop’a pang ho le sepai lamkai hon eihin hol’uvin, kalenggam sunga eitungdoh kit’uvin, kei jong kaminthanbe cheh kit’in ahi.

Tun vang Nebuchadnez’zar kitipa keiman van gam lengpa chu kavahchoiyin, kachoi-anin nasa tah-in kajabol tai: ijeh-inem itileh anatoh jouse adih soh keiyin, alamlhah jouse jong ajangsoh keiye; chule mihem koi koi hileh akiletsah tapou chu suhnem theiya um cheh ahibouve.
Lengpa Belshaz’zar chun amilen amilalte sang khat jen din golvah nasa tah khat abol’in, hiche mi sang khat maiya chun ju adontai.

Belshaz’zar hinju chu atep’in, hichun apa Nebuchadnez’zar kitipan Jerusalem houin sunga kona ahinpoh doh sana le dangka khon ho chu ju donna dingin athumin ahinchoi peh diuvin aseitai, hiche khonhoa chu lengpa ajite, chule athaikem hon ju adonna diuvin aseiye.

Chuphat’in mihon jong Jerusalem khopi Pathen houin sunga kona kipodoh sana le dangka khonho chu ahinchoi lut’uvin ahileh, lengpa le milen milal ho chule lengpa jite leh athaikem hon ju don nan amang tauve.
Hiti hin amahon; ju adon’uvin, sana le dangka, sum-eng le thih, thing le song pathen atihou chu avahchoi choi jenguve.

Hichepet tah chun khutphang khat ahung kilah-in, akhutjung ho chun lengpa leng inpi bang, thaomei kitunna khom toh kimai ngat laitah a chun in bang kiloijol laiya lekha ahinjih-in, khut’in lekha ajih chu lengpan jong amutai.
Chutah chun lengpa jong amaiso akikhel hel jengin, alungthima alung gel jouse akichasoh tan, atahsa pumpi jong akithing jengin, akhup buh teni geiyin akihot lhul jenge.

Lengpa jong apengjah jengin, ailhim them ho leh Chaldea mite chule ahsi lekhathem ho akoupeh diuvin aseitai. Babylon gamsunga kona miching mihem hung kikhomho jah a chun lengpan aseiyin, “Koi koi hijeng jongleh hiche lekha kijih kisun hi asim thei auma ipi kiseina ham aledoh thei aumleh, ponsandup manlu tah kisilpeh-a, sanavui angong changa ki-o peh ding, chule kalenggam sunga vaihom thum lhinna pang ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin lengpa miching mithemho chu ahung lutsoh keiyun, ahivangin amahon lekha kisun chu asimthei pouvin, ipi kiseina ham, tijong lengpa jah a ahetsah thei deh tapouve.
Chutah jong chun lengpa Belshaz’zar chu akicha dehset kit’in, amaiso akikhel hei hoi jeng tai; chuin amilen amilalte jong alung dong gamtauve.

Lengnu jong chu lengpa le amilen milalte thusei poh chei choi jeh chun golvah kibolna indan lhong laiya chun ahung vah lut jengin, hichea hin lengnun jong aseitai, “Vo lengpa hingsot’in! Nalungthim kichatsah dan lang, nalim namel jong kikhelsah tel tul hih-in.

Nangma lenggam sunga hin mihem khat achengin ama chunga hi Pathen Theng Lhagao cheng jing ahi. Napa khang laiyin jong hiche pa chunga hi khovah le hetkhenna chule chihna kimu dohsa ahin, hijeh a chu napa Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan ama hi mitpheldoi them ho le ailhim them ho, Chaldea mite, chule ahsi lekha themho lah a apipua anapansah ahi;

ijeh-inem itileh lhagao kidang tah, hetna le mang ledoh theina hetkhenje, thu tekah kiseiho hetna hilchetna, thu hahsa sa suitohje thepna kiti hi Daniel chunga akimui; amapa hi lengpan amin jong Belteshaz’zar asah-e. Tunjong Daniel chu gakousah le chun ipi kiseina ham, ti aman nahiltan te,” ahung ti.

Chuphat’in Daniel chu lengpa angsunga ahinpui lut paitauve. Lengpan jong Daniel jah a aseiyin, “Nang hi Daniel kitipa, Judah gamsunga kona kapa lengpan ahinkai mang, Judah mite lah a soh chang khat chu nahin.
Nang chunga hin Pathen Theng Lhagao achenge, tin kajan, chujongleh nachunga hin khovah le thil hetkhen themna, chihna giltah, akimui, akiti.

Chule tu chun hiche lekha kisun hi simdoh a ipi kiseina ham, ti kahenga ledoh din miching jouse le ailhim them jouse ka-angsunga ahinpui lut’uvin ahileh, amaho chun hiche hi ipi kiseina ahiding aledoh thei tapouve.

Ahivangin nanghin aledohna neitheiyin natin, ipi thu hitam, ti ahahsa jouse suitoh theiyin nate, ti kanajai. Hijeh chun tun hiche lekha kisun khu nasim theiya ahileh simin lang, chule ipi kiseina ham neiledoh peh temin, nabol thei leh ponsandup manlu tah kasilpeh a, nangong changa sana khivui ka-o peh ding, lenggam sunga hi vaihom thum lhinna napan ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Daniel’in jong lengpa angsunga adonbut’in, “Thil napeh ding ho chu nangma chang tan, chule kipaman napeh ding jong chu midang pen; hijongleh keiman lekha kisun khu lengpa din simpeh ing ting, ipi kiseina ham, tijong ledoh peh nange.
Vo lengpa, Hatchungnung Pathenin napa Nebuchadnez’zar chu leng achansah-in, minthanna le loupina amusah-in, lal loupina apei;

aman hitia minthanna apeh jeh hin mitin vaipi le namtin vaipi, paotin tanga mi amaiya akitihot hot’uvin, aging lheh jenguve; atha ding ho hihen lang, ahinghoi ding ho hihen, atundoh ding hihen, asotnem ding ho hiu jongleh aging cheh-ui.
Ahivangin alungthim achoisang phat’in alung atahlo tan hijeh chun kiletsah hoitho tah-in na atonge; hijeh chun alengmun a konin akikaidoh-in alaltouna akilahpehin, aloupina jong akilamang tai.

Mihem chenna lah a konin akidel mangin, alungthim jeng jong sahem lungthim bangin akiheidoh peh tai, chujongle gamlah a sangante toh achengkhom in ahi; bongchal bangin hamhing anen, Hatchungnung Pathenin mihemte lenggam chunga vai ahomin, lenggam chunga hi adei dei mi atun ahibouve, ti ahetdoh kahsen atahsa jeng jong vana hung lha daitwi douvin anaumin ahi.
Chule achapa Belshaz’zar nangin jong nalungthim a kineosahna naneipon, hicheng hi aboncha nahet vangin,

nang le nang van Pakai dou nan nakichoi sangin ahi; hijeh chun van Pakai houina khonho chu min nahinchoi lut peh-uvin, nang le namilen namilalte, najite leh nathaikem hon hiche khonho chu judon nan namang uvin ahi; chukalval’in jong nangman dangka le sana, sum-eng, thih, thing le song pathen ahi, tia kisemthu ho kho muthei loule khoja theilou ho chu navahchoi choi jengin, akhut’a nahina a hu geiya um jing Pathen, nalamlhah jouse aman nasempeh, hiche Pathen chu gin le jan nabolpoi.
“Hiche Pathena kona hiche khut namu chu hung kilhangdoh a, hichea lekha kisun hi ajih ahiye.
Hichea kijih lekha kisun hi hitia kisim ahi: MENE, MENE, TEKEL chule PARSIN kiti ahi.
Hiche thudola aledohna chu hiti ahi: MENE kiti hin Pathenin nalenggam beina ding nikho simtohsa akoi ahitan, asuhbei ding ahitai;
chule TEKEL kiti hin nang hi thiltena kilep toh banga kilep tohsa nahitai, ahin nalhingjou tapoi;
PERES kiti kit hin nangma lenggam hi akikehson Mede mite leh Persia mite akihoppeh tai, tina ahi, atipeh-e.“

Chutah chun Belshaz’zar chun thu apen, Daniel chu ponsandup manlu tah asilpeh-uvin, angong changa sana khivui a-opeh-un, Daniel chung chang thudola thuphon akibol’in, lenggam sunga vaihom thum channa pang din akiseidoh tai.
Hiche janle le hin Chaldea mite lengpa Belshaz’zar kitipa chu min athat tai.
Mede mi Darius kitipan akum kum somgup le kum ni alhinin lenggam chu akilah tai.
Alenggam pumpia vaihom thunei mi ja khat le som ni lhendoh a alenggam sunga vai homsah ding Darius lengpan adeiyin;

mi hicheng chunga hin vaipipo mi thum apansah-in, Daniel jong khat’in apange; hicheng vaipipo henga hi vaihom thuneiya pang jousen kai adonjat’u apeh lut’uva, lengpa chu lhasam louhel’a aumna ding angaitoi.

Daniel kitipa hi vaipipo lah leh vaihom thunei mi chujat lah a chun aminthang penin apang tai; ijeh-inem itileh Daniel chunga hi Pathen Lhagao hattah panga ahi; hijeh chun lengpan Daniel chu lenggam pumpi chunga pansah din agotai.

Chuphat’in vaipipo teni leh vaihom thuneiya pang hon lenggam chung chang thudola Daniel thepmona ding angai touvin ama douna ding aholtauve; ahivanginla amudoh deh pouvin, amona ding aholdoh theipouve; ajeh chu Daniel hi mi kitah gen-ngaitah ahin, achung changa themmona akimudoh tapoi.

Chuphat’in hiche miho hin aseiyun, “Itin itijongleh eihon hiche Daniel kitipa douna athemmona ding imudoh thei louhel diu ahi, ama Pathen chung chang thudol’a ahilouleh adang thepmo sahna ding aumpoi,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun vaipipo teni leh vaihom thuneiho chu akihoutoh uvin lengpa henga ahungun ajah a aseitauve, “Vo lengpa Darius, hingsot’in!

Lenggam sunga vaipipoa pang teni leh miching mithemte lamkaiho, vaihom thuneiya pang ho, leng thumop’a pang ho leh gamvaipo chengsen kihou lhuhna khat kaneiyun, lengpan dan khat naphudoh a, hiche dan chu chesah ding, nisom thum sunga mihem koimachan nang kom, lengpa koma tilouva taona le thumna aneiya ahileh, hitobang mi chu sakei bahkaite hong sunga selut jeng ding katiuve.

Hijeh chun vo lengpa; hiche dan chu semdoh-in lang, alekha chu kikhut-henna bol khumin, kikhel thei louhel din koiyin, Mede mite le Persia mite danthu dungjuiya lahdoh kit thei louhel din umsah tan,” atiuve.
Hichejeh chun Darius lengpan jong hiche kigahna lekha chu khut-henna abol khum tai.

Hiche kigahna lekha chu kikhut-henna akibol den tai, ti Daniel chun ahedoh tan, hijeh chun ainlama achen, aindan chung nunga Jerusalem lam nga bang phabep kihonna dan sunga alut tai; masanga anabolji bangin, hikoma hin aboh khup’in akhup buh te nin apansan ataovin Pathen maiya athangvah jin nikhat sungin thumvei vei aboljie.
Chuin miphalouho chu akihoutoh-uvin ahunguva avet’uleh, Daniel chun a-Pathen maiya taona le thumna ananeiyin, hichu ahung mudoh tauve.

Chutah chun amaho jong ahung lhailut paiyun lengpa angsunga dan kisem chung chang thudol chun aheh tauve, “Vo lengpa, nangkom tilouva mihem koi hijongleh nisom thum sunga hi Pathen henga taona neiya auma ahileh sakei bahkaite hong sunga lelut ding ahi, tia nangman dan kisemdoh chu kikhut-henna nabolden hitalou ham?” ahung tiuve. Lengpan jong adonbut’in, “Hiche dan kisemdoh chu keh louva um jing, Mede mite le Persia mite danthu dungjuiya kiladoh kit thei lou ding ahi,” tin aseiye.

Hichun amahon jong lengpa angsunga adonbut’uvin, “Vo lengpa, Judah gama kona soh chang ho lah mi khat Daniel kitipa chun nathu angaipon, nangman kikhut-henna nabolsa lekha jong chu akhohsah deh poi; nikhat sungin thumvei vei atao ngaiyin atao bouve,” tin aheh tauve.
Lengpan hiche kiseiho hi ajah doh phat’in alung gim lheh jengin, Daniel huhdoh teina dingin lungthima giltah-in agel pan tai; Daniel huhdohna dingin nisa lhum geiyin na atongin thil angaitoi.

Ahin hiche miphalou ho chu akihoutoh uvin lengpa henga ahungun, lengpa jah a aseitauve, “Vo lengpa, phatechan hethemin, Mede mite leh Persia mite danthu dungjuiya dan kisemdoh a kigahna kibolsa chu lengpan aphudoh tengleh kikhel thei louhel ding ahi,” atiuve.
Chuphat’in lengpan jong thu apen, Daniel chu agaman’uvin sakei bahkaite hong sunga aleh lut tauve. Lengpan Daniel jah a aseiyin, “Tantih neilouva nahou jing na-Pathenin nahuhdoh tei tei hen!” ati.

Chuin songtum khat atang lut’uvin sakei bahkai hong kot chu asing tauve, lengpan akot khah chu akhutjem a mohor chun anam khum in, amilen amilalte khutjem mohor jousen jong anamkhum sah tai; hitia chu Daniel chung chang thudol’a imacha khel thei lou din akoitai.
Chuin lengpa jong aleng inpi lama achen, jan chun an angol’in akhovah hel’in, nopsah na imacha jong nei louvin aumin, ihmu mo hel’in akhovah tai.
Jingkah khovah phat’in lengpa jong akipatdoh loiyin kin le bongin sakei bahkai hong sung lama chun achei.

Lengpa chu Daniel kiselutna hong sung chu ahung nailam phat’in lhase tah-in ahung peng jah jengin, Daniel jah ding chun, “Vo Daniel, Pathen hing jing lhachapa, tang louva nahou jing naPathen chun sakei bahkai ho lah a kona nahuhdoh jou hinam?” ahung ti.
Hichun Daniel’in jong lengpa jah a aseipeh-in, “Vo lengpa, hing sot’in!

Ka-Pathenin a-Vantil ahinsol’in sakei bahkai jouse kamsung asinpeh tan, keima eisuse tapouve; ajeh chu Pathen maiya keima nolna beiyin kaumin, Vo lengpa, nangma ang sung jenga jong bol khel kaneipoi,” ahin ti.

Chutah chun lengpa jong akipah behseh jengin, sakei bahkai hong sunga kona Daniel lah doh loi din thu apetai. Hijeh chun hong sunga konin Daniel akaidoh tauve. Atahsa chunga chun imacha maha akisuh khahna aumpoi, ajeh chu aman a-Pathen akisonpia atahsan jeh ahiye.

Chujong le lengpan thu apen, Daniel heh a pang ho chu aga man’uvin, amaho joh chu sakei bahkai ho hong sunga aleh lut tauve; amaho jong, achateu jong, chule ajiteu gei geiyin aleh lutsoh keiyuve. Aleh lhah uva ahileh sakei hong sung ato tola achuh masang uvin sakei bahkai hon akimat tan gam’uvin, agu achang geiyuvin apet bongsoh keiyuvin achip ngimsoh tauve.
Chuphat’in Darius lengpan jong mitin vaipi lah le namtin vaipi lah, leiset chung cheng paotin tang lah a lekha athot’in, “Nachunguva cham lenbe be jeng hen.

Keiman kigahna khat kasemdoh tai, keima lengvai neina gam pumpia miten Daniel Pathen chu aginsoh keiyuva a-angsunga kitihot hot’a um cheh diu ahi. Ajeh chu ama hi Pathen hing jing ahin, Tonsot tongsot geiya thoh jou jing ahi; Alenggam jong itih chan geiya kisumang lou ding, Alengvai neina jong hi beitih neilou ding ahi.
Hiche Pathen hin mi ahuhdoh jin ahuhhing jie, Melchihna le thil kidang tampi abol’ jin, Van le leiset’a na kidang atonge; Sakei bahkaiho hatna lah a Daniel huhdoh a jong hiche Pathen hi ahi,” ati.
Hitobang tah hin hiche Daniel kitipa chu Darius leng vaipoh lai le Persia mi Cyrus lengvaipoh laisen apha theiyin akhangtou jing jenge.

Babylon lengpa Belshaz’zar leng chan kal kum masa kumin jalkhuna alupna Daniel’in mang khat aneiyin alu-lhuna themgao thilmu khat amui, hiche amang hi lekhan asundoh-in, chule athudol chu akaigop’in aseiye.
Hichea hin Daniel chun aseiye, “Keiman jan manga themgao thilmu tobanga thil kamu chun, vetan van ninglia kona khopi hui hung nung chun Twikhanglen lenpa chu asem lingsoh hel tai.
Hichun Twikhanglena konin sahem li ahung potdoh-uvin, aki-limlo beihel’in achom cheh ahiuve.

Sahem masa pen chu sakei bahkai tobang ahin, muvanlai lhaving bangin lhaving ni aneiye. Keiman kagah vet’a ahileh alhaving teni chu apul lhan, sahem chu tol’a konin akidom sangin, akeng te nin mihem din bang khun akidinsah tai. Chule alungthim din jong mihem lungthim tobang bang akipei.

Chule vetan, anilhin nan sahem chom khat, savom tobang khat ahungdoh kit’e. Hichun apangpeh lang khat’in akidinsah-in, akamsunga aha chung le noi kah a chu sa nahgu thum amom’e; chujongleh hiche sahemjah a chun akiseipeh-in, ‘Kipatdoh- in lang sahing najo chan ganen,’ akiti.

Hichejou jong hin kavet’a ahileh, vetan, sahem chom khat, lutnu tobang khat kamun, atungtuna chun vacha lhaving bang khun alhaving li jen akeh-e; hiche sahem hin luchang li aneiyin, lengvai neina chu ama hi akipetai.

Hiche nung jong hin keiman jan manga themgao thilmua thil kamunaa chun kamu kit’in, vetan, sahem li lhinna chu, tijat jat kichat chat um jeng, ahat’a hat khat ahin, aha jouse jong chu thih jeng ahi. Hiche sahem hin sa anen alhaingimset sot jengin, chujou tengleh amoh chengse jong chu akengphang te nin achilgoi goi jin ahi. Hiche sahem hi kamu masah dang dang jouse sangin achomhel jenge; aki jeng jong som khat aneiye.

Akiho chu kagel gel’a ahileh, vetan, akiho lah a kon chun aki chombeh khat jong ahung dondoh kit nalaiye, hichun neocha ahin, ahung kehdohna ajung akhoa konin amaiya aki masa thum ho chu apul lhah lo tai; chujongle vetan, hiche akia hin mihem mit teni tobang amit ni aume, akam jong ahomin, thil nasa tah tah thu asei jengin ahi.

Hichun kavet’a ahileh, Laltouna phabep ahung kidon, Gollui khang laiya pat um jingpan touna alotai; Aponsil avon chu buhbang banin abangin, Alujang sam jong chu samul jolsel tobang ahi; Alaltouna jong chu meisi pah lah lah leu ahin, Akitunna velkol-ho jong meikong jeng ahibouve.

Meikong chu twilonin ahung longdoh jengin, Ama masanga konin ahung longdoh-e Asang sangin ama kin abol’uvin, A-angsunga chun sang som jat sang soma tam adinguve; Thutanna in muna thutan din atoutan, Chuin lekhabu jouse aphongdoh tauve.
Sakin thu thongje jua asei chu kanabenga agin jing jeh chun kenjong kavetai. Hitia kavet pet tah chun sahem chu akithat’in, atahsa jong akichenpanin, meilhum sunga go din apehdoh tauve.
Sahem dang ho jong alengvai neinau akilah mangpeh-in, ahinkhou jong phat chom khat umbea kum khat tou hinbe din akikoitai.

Jana themgao thilmu banga thil kamu chun hiti hin kamun, Vetan, vanlaijol’a meilhang lom toh kilhonin Mihem chapa tobang khat ahungin, Ama chu gollui laipeh a pat’a hung hungpeh ahin, Ama chu a-angsunga akipuilut tai.

Chule ama chu lengvai neina le loupina Chule lenggam akipetai. Hijeh a chu mitin vaipi, namtin vaipia kon Paotin tanga min ama kin abol’uva ahou diu ahi; Alengvai neina chu tonsot geiya Lengvai neina hiding ahin. Itih jongleh beitih aneilou ding ahi; Alenggam jong chu mantih neilouva um a kisuselou ding ahitai.
“Daniel kitipa kei din, kalulhun koma hung um hiche themgao thilmua thil kamu hin kalungthim asugim lheh jengin ahi.
Hijeh chun keijong kachen chukoma ding ho khat chu thilsoh hijat thudola adih pen ding kadongin ahi. Chuphat’in kadohpan jong eiseipeh-in, thil hijat hilchetna aledohna geiyin eihil tai.
Aman aseiyin, ‘Hiche sahem li ho hi leiset’a hung leng chang ding leng li ahiuve.
Amavang Hatchungnung Pathen Mithengten lenggam chu alahpehuva tonsot tonsot geiya mantih neilouva lenggam chu alo diu ahitai,’ ati.

Chujouvin kenjong sahem li lhinna pa, adang ho sanga jatchom hel, tijat kichat um chungnung, ahatu jouse thih jeng hiya, atin jouse jong sum-eng hipa, sahing nea, ahal hal’a mehgoi jeng, akengphang te nia chilgoi jengpa thudol chu ipi kiseina mong ham, tin adih chu kahet nom lheh jeng tai.“

Aki jong som khat jen aneiya, aluchanga aki jouse kehsoh keiyuva, akichom khatma ahung momdoh kit’a aki masa thum ho maiya ahung dondoh phat’a aki thum ho apul jeng thusim, aki mihem mit tobang mit ni jen neiya, akam jong homa thil nasa tah sei jeng thei, akidang jouse sanga jong lenjo thusim jong chu abonchan kahet nom lheh-e.
Hitia hi kavet vet leh, hiche aki hin Mithengte toh kidouna aneiyin gal’in akisat pin, abonchauvin ajousoh keiyin.
gollui laipeh a um jingpa ahunga Hatchungnung Pathen Mithengte thutanna akipeh a, Mithengten lenggam akisanna diu phat alhin kahsen athajou pouve.

“Ama chun hiti hin aseiye: Sahem li lhinna thudol hi ahileh, Leiset chunga hi lenggam li lhinna hung um ding, Hiche lenggam chu lenggam dang jouse sanga jatchom hel hiya adangto kilo lou ding, Hiche lenggam hin leiset pumpi aval lhuma, Kengto chotpha anei ding achilgoi ding ahi.

Aki som khat thudol chu ahikit leh Hiche lenggama kona hi leng som khat hung umdoh ding, Leng som khat nunga hi Leng chom khatma hung umdoh kit ding ahi; Hiche leng chom khat chu Leng masa ho sanga jatchom hel ding. Chujongleh hiche lengpa hin leng thum ajoa asuh lhah ding ahi.

Hiche lengpa hin Hatchungnung Pathen douna thu aseiya, Hatchungnung Pathen Mithengte adeljam ding, Kum jong danthu jong akhelnom ding ahi; Mithengte chu hiche lengpa khut’a hi Kum khat ham, kum ni ham, kum keh ham dia kipedoh diu ahiye.
Amavang thutanna in muna thutan ding hung pansa a, Hiche lengpa lengvai neina chu kilahpeh ding, Alenggam kibahgam soh hel’a Achaina keiya kisubei hel ding ahitai.

Chutah leh Hatchungnung Pathen Mithengte chu Lenggam jong lengvai neina jong, Vannoi leiset pumpia lenggam jouse loupina jong Aboncha amaho kipedoh soh kei ding, Mithengte lenggam chu tonsot lenggam hiya, Lengvai neina jousen amaho thu angaiyuva athu’uva nung cheh diu ahi,’ ati.

Thilmu kimu thudol chu hitia hi kichai ahitai. Daniel kitipa keivang kalung agim lheh jengin, kamel geiyin akikhel lo hel’e; ahivangin athudol hi seidoh louvin kalung gil’a kaching jinge,“” atin ahi.“
Themgao thilmu kamu masah jou, Belshaz’zar lengpa leng chan kal kum thum lhin kumin Daniel kitipa keima henga themgao thilmua kimu khat ahung kilah kit’e.
Hiche thilmu kamuna a hin ken thil khat kamui; ahin hiche thil kamu hin Elam gamkai sunga khopi lenpen munpi Susa kitia chun kana umin ahi. Hiche kathilmu hin keima U’lai vadung panga kanaum khai.

Kakhodah in kavet a ahileh, vetan, vadung panga chun kelngoichal khat hi anadingin ahi. kelngoichal chun ki ni aneiyin, aki te ni chu asao theiyin, ahin aki khatjoh chu alang khat ki sangin asaojoi; hiche asaojo chu adondoh nukhahjo ma ahibouve.

Kelngoichal hin nilhum lam pou sahlam pou chule lhanglam pou adel khumji kamui; ama masanga chun sahem khat cha jong apang jou pon, ama thahat’a kona achu lhajou jong aumpoi; aman adei deiyin abol jengin, ama le ama akichoi sang tai.

Hitia hi keiman lung kagel gel pet’in vetan, kelchal khat nilhuma konin ahungin leiset lailung tah ahinjot peh-in, tol tongkha louhel’in ahunge; hiche kelchal hin amit teni kah a ki loupi tah khatseh seh aneiye.

Hiche kelchal hi ki ni neiya kelngoichal henga hin ahungin, keiman kamuna mun vadung panga chun kelngoichal hi ana ding jing nalaiye; kelchal chu athahat neicha sun sunin alhaiyin, kelngoichal chu adelkhum e.

Kelchal hin kelngoichal anailut chu kamun, kitapi din lung hangtah-in anailut jengin, kelngoichal chu atajeng leh aki teni chu atanbong tai; hijeh chun kelngoichal kelchal masanga apang jou tapon, atha abeitai, chuphat’in kelchal’in jong kelngoichal chu aleh-in tolse nan aneiyin, achunga akichomin achil jenge; kelchal masanga kelngoichal huhdoh jou ding koimacha aumtapoi.

Chutah chun kelchal jong ama le ama nasa tah-in akichoi sange; hitobanga ahatdoh phat hin aki loupi tahpa chu abong paiyin, hiche khel hin aki loupi cheh li ahung dondoh paiyin, van ningli to kitoh donin ahung kehdoh tai.

Aki li lah a chun aki neocha khat jong ahung dondoh kit’in, hiche aki neocha chu ahung khangdoh-in nasa tah-in alendoh kit tan, lhanglam ngan jong, niso lam nganjong, chule gam loupi ngan jong akhangin ahi.
Akhanbe kit nalaiyin, van loupina ho geiyin aphatai; ahsi ho lah a phabep jong apih lhan tol’a ahung lhauve, chule hiche ahsi ho gei jong hin achilgoi goi jenge.
Chuin ama jong hi achamtah-in akichoi sang kit’in, van sepaite lamkaipa geiyin adeh jengin, tang louhel’a min pumgo thilto apeh jiu jong chu alahpeh-in, muntheng phung jong alekhup peh bel jenge.
Suh khel jeh a tang louhel’a pumgo thilto kitoh leh sepaiho geiyin ama khut’a akipedoh tan, thudih jong tol’a akichotphan, hitobang tah hin hiche saki chu achatloh-in amachallheh jenge.

Hichun Mitheng khat’in thu asei kajan, athuseipa chu Mitheng dang khat man ahouvin hitin aseiye, “Hiche tang louhel’a pumgo thilto kitoh thudol le ima jouse ahomkeova umsah jeng suh khelna thudol, muntheng le sepaite kengto chotpha nei dinga kipehdoh thudol’a themgao thilmu thudol hi itih chan geiya hitia hi um ding ham?” tin adonge.
Chuphat’in khat chun khat jah a aseipeh-in, “Nilhah le jingkah sang ni le ja thum geiya hitia hi um ding ahin, chujou tengleh muntheng jong aumna ding dol’a kikoiya kithah semdoh ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Daniel kitipa keiman themgao thilmua thil kamu tengleh hetchet tei din kagoi; hichea hin vetan, kamasanga mihem limput tobanga pu khat ahung dinge.
Chujongleh U’lai vadung pang jet le vei kah a chun mihem ogin tobang khat kajan, a-ogin chun mi ahinkouvin, “Gabriel, hichepa hi hichea themgao thilmua kivetsah hi hilchenin,” tin asol’e.

Hijeh chun ama jong kadinna koma ahung nailut’e; aman eihin nailut phat’in keijong kakicha tan, kaboh khup’in tol’a kamai kasulut tai. Ahivangin aman jong kajah a aseiyin, “Vo mihem chapa; hiche themgao thilmua nakivetsah hi phat kichai ding thudol ahi, ti kichenin hethemin,” eiti.
Hitia hi aman kajah athu aseiphat’in keijong tol’a chun kamai kasulut’in ka-ihmu ngil del jenge; ahivangin aman eithamin kakeng phang te nin eidinsah tai.
Aman aseiyin, “Vetan, lung damlouna akichaisoh a thilsoh ding chu nahenga kahetsah ding nahi; hiche hin phat kichaina ding kiteppeh chutoh kitoh a ima nahilchet ding ahi.
Chule nangin namu aki ni neiya kelngoichal chu, aki teni hi Media lengpa le Persia lengpa ahilhone.
Kelchal vang chu Greek lengpa ahin, amit teni kah a aki lenpa chu Greek leng masapen ahitai.
Chule hiche aki chu akivoh boh a, ama khel’a aki li ahung dondoh jeng banga chu hiche lengpa nam mite lah a kona hi, ama thahat vang hilouva, lenggam li jen hung khangdoh ding ahi.
Amaho hi avaihomu ajo nalam teng, thil akaleh akalouva bole suh khel apilhinset tengleh, thulem kisei ima hekhen themtah, amaiso kin louhel leng khat hung lendoh ding ahi.
Hiche lengpa hi thanei tah a hung panga, tijat kichat umtah manthahna asosah ding, abol lam lama lolhing theiya, mihat tah tah ho jong Mithengte chutoh asuhgam tha ding ahi.

Aduha thuh jeh a akhut noiya jou le nal alensah a, alung gil’a ama le ama kichoi sang ding ahi. Gihsal masa louhel’a mi tamtah asuh mang ding, milen milalte lamkaipa geiya adeh ding ahi; ahinla mihem khut thahat vanga ama hi kimeh goi jou louhel ding ahi.

Nilhah chujat le jingkah chujat thudol’a themgao thilmu kihil chetna hi adih mong mong ahi; ahivanginla hiche thilmu kinei hi mohor namden in lang koitan, ajeh chu tua pat din nikho le phat sotpi aum nalaiye,” ati.

Chujouvin Daniel kitipa keijong nikho phabep sungin kati aja behseh jengin kanatlo tai; chujouvin kathouvin lengpa natong kinbol din kachetai; ahivanginla kathilmu chun eilung gimsah jing jengin, he la kahet chen hih hel’e.
Chaldea mite chung alenggam chunguva lenga hung pang, apen lama Mede mia peng Ahasu-e’rus kitipa chapa Darius leng chan kal kum khat lhin kum,

ama lengvaipoh kum masa kum Daniel kitipa keiman lekhabu dunga kamudoh tan, Jerimiah themgaopa henga Pakaiyin asei dungjuiya, Jerusalem ahomkeova akijam khu akum jat, kum som sagi chu kichaisoh tei tei ding ahi, ti kamudoh tai.
Chutah chun kenjong Pakai Pathen lam ka-ngan, ahenga taona le thumna kathon, an ka-ngol’in, khaodip pon kasil’in, vutvam kakiloiye.

Pakai ka-Pathen henga kataovin kasetna kaphongin hitin kaseiye. “O Pakai, loupi tah leh tijat umtah Pathen, nangma hi na-ngailute nathupeh jouse nit te dinga akitepna nit jinga alungset longlouva lungset jing nahin.
Keiho kachonseuvin gilou tah-in thil kabol’uvin doumah mah-in kachon’un, nangma thupeh jouse le nachonna dan jouse kadonda soh tauve;
keihon nalhacha themgao ho, nangma min pan’a kalengteu heng le keiho dia milen malalte henga, chule kapu kapateu leh gamsung mipi henga thuseiho chu athuseiyu kangai tapouve.

Vo Pakai, dihna kiti chu nanga bou ahin, tulaiya hi keiho Judah gam mite leh Jerusalem khopia chengte, gamla le naiya cheng Israel chate jouse dinga, nangma douna jou le nal jenga thil kabol jeh-uva eikidel’uva kachen nau gamtin gamtanga hi mai jumna bou leng ahitai.
Vo Pakai, keiho dinga mai jumna leng ahin, kalengteu le keihodia milen milalte, kapu kapateu dinga jong nang douna kachonset jeh-uva mai jumna leng-ah ahitai.
Pakai ka-Pathenu henga vang hepina le ngaidamna a um jinge; keihon ama douna kabol’uva,
aman athemgao alhacha a pang ho kama kona ka-angsunguva aseidoh danthu ho jong jui louva Pakai kaPathen thusei ka-ngai lou vangun, hepi le ngaidamna ama a umbou ahiye.

Israel pumpi hin nangma danthu asuh khel’a kihei mangsoh hel ahiuvin, nathusei gin jong ngailouva um ahitauve. Hijeh a chu ama douna kachonset jeh-uva Pathen lhachapa Mose danthu lekhabua kisun gaosapna le hahselna chu keiho chunga twi sunlhah banga kisung lha ahitai.

Pakai Pathenin aseisa chu amolsoa, keiho douna asei chengse chu kachung uva vaihoma pang kavai homteu le keiho chunga hitobang hamsetna nasa hi alhunsah a amolso ahitai; ajeh chu vannoi leiset pumpia hi Jerusalem douna thil kibol tobang hi kibol kha lou lai hel ahi.

Mose danthu lekhabua kisun banga hamsetna hijatpi hi keiho chunga hung lhung ahitan, ahivangin keihon kathemmo nau kadalha hih laiyun, nangma thudih kakhohsah pouvin, Pakai kaPathenu henga taona kanei nom hih laiyui.

Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin hiche hamsetna hi gonsa anakoiya, kachunguva alhunsah jeng ahi; ajeh chu Pakai kaPathenu hi atoh abolna jousea adih chang jing jeng ahi, keiho joh hin athusei ogin kajah peh dauva athu ka-ngai loujeh-u ahibouve.

Vo Pakai ka-Pathenu, tun vang keiho kachonse tauve, hijongleh nangma hi tulaiya nahi bang banga thanei nahin, Egypt gama kona naban thahat’a namite nahinpui doh a, minpha changsa nahitan, keihon vang gilou tah a thilse kaboldoh-u ahitai.

O Pakai, nangin dih tah a thil nabolji bang chun, nakhopi Jerusalema kon leh nalhang thenga kon hin nalunghan le nalungsat chu ladoh tan; ajeh chu keiho chonset jeh leh kapu kapateu themmo jal’in Jerusalem khopi le namite hi kavel dunguva chengte lah a seichah a umdoh kahitauve.
Vo ka-Pathenu, tun nalhachapa keima taona le kathumna hi nei ngaipeh tei teiyin: O Pakai, nang le nang kikhohsah jal’in tua dalhah thip’a umsa namuntheng phunga khun namaivah salvah kit tan.

O ka-Pathen, nakol hinsungin lang ngaiyin; namit hasah-in lang ahom keova kalup jengu pi hi vetan, nangma min kiputsah khopi jong khu vetemin; ajeh chu keiho thepna jal’a hiche thumna hijatpi hi na-angsunga kaneiyu ahitapoi, nangma mihepi nasat jeh joh a kaneiyu ahibouve.

Vo Pakai ngaiyin, vo Pakai ngaidamin; o Pakai, khohsah-in lang neibolpeh jengun; o ka-Pathen, nang le nang kikhoh sah nan kho-ngai sot loujenin, ajeh chu nakhopi le namite hi nangma mina kiminvo cheh ahiuve,” kati.
Hitia hi keiman thu kaseiya taona kaneiya, keima chonset le kamite Israel chonset kaphondoh a, ka-Pathen lhang theng dia Pakai ka-Pathen angsunga kathumna jouse kapoh lut’a,
taova thu kasi sei pet hin, themgao thilmua kamu masah pen Gabriel kiti mipa chu nilhah lam kilhaina gantha phat don khun hamve vun kahenga ahung lenglut tai.
Gabriel chu kahenga ahungin kajah a aseitai. “Vo Daniel, chihna le thil hetkhen themna napenge, tia keima hung potdoh kahi.

Nahung tao akipatna lama chun thu khat ahung potdoh jengin, hichu naseipeh inge, tia nahenga hung kahiye; ijeh-inem itileh nang hi hatah a Pathenin na-ngailut ahi; hijeh chun athu hi phatechan geltoh in lang thil namu jong chu hekhen in.

“Namite le nakhopi theng chung changa suh khel suhbeina ding, chonset suhmangna ding, themmo thoidamna ding, tonsot’a dih poh lutna ding, themgao thilmu le themgao khapna ding, muntheng chungnung thao mi kitna dinga hi kum jat hapta som sagi lut dinga thugahna kibolsa ahitai.

Hijeh chun kihet themin, Jerusalem kisemphat’a sah phatna ding thu kiseidoh a pat leng chapa thao nusa khat hung ding gei hi hapta sagi lhing ding ahi. Chujou tengleh hapta somgup le hapta ni sunga Jerusalem khopi chu kisapha kit’a, aveng ningkoi dung akholai dung jouse kisempha ding, amavang genthei hesoh pum puma kibol ding ahi.

Hapta somgup le hapta ni akichai teng, thao nusa pa chu kipaidoh ding, imacha bol ding aneilou ding ahitai; chule ahung dinga kiseipa leng chapa chu amiten khopi le muntheng asuhmang diu ahi. Akichaina chu twisoh banga hung umdoh ding, akhonna leh gal hung uma, ahomkeova kijam kit dia thugahna kisemsa ahitai.

Chule aman mi tamtah toh hapta khatseh seh dia kitepna nasa tah abol ding; hiche hapta keh khat sunga chu kilhaina gantha jong asuh hai ding, thilto jong akha ding ahi; khopi sugam a pangpa chunga achaina chu twisuna akisun lhah masangsea mi sugama pangpa chu thet umtah tah lhaving te chunga toujing ding ahinalaiye, ati.“

Cyrus kiti Persia lengpa leng chan kal kum thum lhin kumin Belteshaz’zar kisah Daniel kitipa henga thu khat ahung kiphongtai. Thu kiphong chu adih-in kitomona lentah ahiye. Daniel in thu kisei chu ahedoh tan, themgao thilmua thil amu jong chu ahedoh tai.
Hiche lai hin Daniel kitipa keima hapta thum sungin kalung ahem gunset’e.
Atui alhum jong kanepon, sa jong kanepon, lengpitwi jeng jong kakamsunga alut poi; hapta thum lhingset chun kei le kei jong thao kinu louhel’in kaume.
Lha masa, nisom ni le ni li lhin nin Tigris kiti vadung minthang tah panga chun kana dingin ahi.
Kakhoda a kagah vet leh, vetan, pasal khat’ in tupat ponnem akisil’in, akong janga chun Uphaz gama kon sana akiveiyin ahi.

Atahsa chu song mantam tobang ahin, amaiso kolphe vah bangin avah-e; amit teni jong meikong kide abangin, abanjang teni le akeng teni chu sum-eng kinotval tobang ahin, athusei ogin jong mihonpi tamtah husa abange.

Daniel kitipa keima changseh chun hiche themgao thilmu hi kamu ahi, ajeh chu kakoma um mihon hitobang thilmu hi amupouvin, ahivangin abon chauvin akichasoh keiyuvin ahi, hijeh chun amaho le amaho kiseldoh din ajamsoh tauve.
Hiti hin kachangseh-in eida lhauvin, hitobang thilmu nasa hi kamui, katha abeilo leu jengin, kalimput kamelso jong kidangtah-in akikhel hel jenge, hichun tha him him kanei tapoi.
Hichun kenjong athuseiho chu kajan, athusei gin kajah phat chun, tol’a kamai kasulut’in ahileh kathi mil del jeng tai.
Ahin hichea hin khut khat’in eihin thamin, vetan kadingmo sa san kitihot pum pumin kakhut teni leh kakhup te nin kapasan eibunsah-e.

Ama hin kajah a aseiyin, “Vo ngailut um pen mihem, Daniel, ken nahenga kasei ding thu ho hi ngai phan, chujongle phaten ding jangkeiyin, ajeh chu kei hi na henga dia eihung kisol ahi,” eiti. Aman kajah a hiti hin thu asei nalaiyin keijong kitihot hot’in kadingdoh tai.

Chuphat’in aman kajah a aseiyin, “Kicha hih-in Daniel, nangman na-Pathen angsunga nang le nang nakineosah a hetkhen ding nagot’a nalung gil’a nagelpat nikho amasa nia pat’a nathusei jouse ki-ngaipeh nahitai, hiche nathuseiho jeh a chu keima hung-ah kahiye.

Ni som ni le ni khat sungin Persia lenggama lengpa chapan eilam tin’in, ahinla Vantil lal ho lah a lamkai pipu khat Michael chu keima kithopi din ahungin, hijeh chun kenjong Michael chu Persia lenggama lengpa chapa toh kidou din kada lhatai.
Hichea kona hi kahung paiya khonung tengleh namite chunga ipi hung soh ding ham, ti nangma hetsah dia hunga kahi. Ajeh chu nangma themgao thilmua namu hi khonunga hungsoh ding thil ahibouve,” eiti.
Aman hita thu kiseiho banga hi thu aseipet tah hin keijong kakiheiyin tol lam kavet’a kakun leh paomon kaum lo tai.

Ahivangin vetan, mihem chapate lah a mihem to bang bang khat hin kanephu teni ahung thamin ahileh, keijong kakam kan thu kasei theitai. Hichun kamasanga dingpa jah a chun kaseiyin, “Vo kapu, hiche themgao thilmua thil kamu jeh hin kanatlo tan, tha him him jong kanei tapoi.
Kapu, nalhachapa hi iti kapu toh kakihou lim jou ding hitam? Tua pat hin kathala abeitan, haijong kahaisa jou tapoi,” kati.
Hichun mihem melput tobang pu khat hin eitham kit’in tha eipen eihatdoh sah tai.

Ama hin aseiyin, “Vo ngailut umpen mihem, kicha hih-in, lung mongin um jon; tha phan lang hangin,” eiti. Aman hitia thu asei phat hin kahatdoh tan, hijeh chun kenjong, “Hinsei tan kapu, ajeh chu nangin thahat neipetai,” kati.

Chuphat’in aman jong eidongin, “Ibol’a nahenga hung kahi neihet nah am? Tua hi kile kit’a Persia leng chapa toh kisat kit ding kahi; ama chu kajo tengleh, vetan, Greek leng chapa chu hung ding ahitai.
Hijongleh keiman thudih umna lekhabu sunga kijih chu keiman kaseipeh ding nahi; nang dia leng chapa tobang Michael tailou hiche gal dunga hi eipanpi ding aumpoi.
Keivang hi Mede mi Darius leng chan til kum masa a chu ama dinga panga pandet sah ding le hatsah ding kagot anahi.

“Chule tua hi keiman adih chu kahil ding nahi. Vetan, Persia gamsunga leng thum jen hung lendoh diu ahi; chutengleh leng li channa pa vang chu thum ho sanga hatah a haojo ding ahi; ama hi ahaodoh tengleh Greek gam kisatpi dinga mitin atemkhomsoh kei ding ahiye.
Chujou tah leh leng thanei tah khat hung dingdoh kit’in tin, lengvai neina nasa tah a vai ahom ding, adei deiya thil abol ding ahi.

Ama hi ahung dindoh doh leh alenggam keh pai ding, van ningli jat a kihom khen ding, akhantouna keh pai ding, van ningli jat a kihom khen ding, akhantouna bang leh avaihom laiya alengvai neina banga kibolpeh lou ding ahitai; ajeh chu alenggam kiladoh a hicheng tilou midang joh kipe ding ahitai.
Lhang gam lengpa vang hung thahat ding ahin, ahinla asepai lamkaiho lah a khatpen chu ama sanga hatjo ding, alengvai pohna jong lengvai neina lentah hi ding ahi.“

Kum phabep nung le amahon kihoutohna aneiyuva, lhang gam lengpa jong chu sahlam gam lengpa toh chamna sem dia hung ding ahi; alenggam in vang athahat chu aneijou jing lou ding, alengpa le ason achilhah hon jong athoh jou jing lou diu ahi: alenggam chu mi kipedoh a, agamsunga natong hole achapa, chule nei le gou neiho geiya mi kipedoh ding ahitai.
“Hichelai hileh alenggama kona hi alalna muna kona abah khat hung dondoh ding, abah chu hung kona sahlam lengpa sepaite akisat pia, akulpi sunga lut ding, amaho chu akisat pia ajo ding ahi.

Ama hin adoihou jouseu jong Egypt gam lama apoh manga, milim kilhajol jouse jong apoh mang ding, dangka le sana a kisem khon manlu tah tah ho jong akipoh mang ding ahi; chujou tengleh kum phabep sunga sahlam lengpa kisatpi kit louva kicholdo ding ahi.
Chujou tengleh sahlam lengpa jong lhanglam lengpa gama hung vah lut ding, ahivanga ama gamsung ma ma a kinung le kit ding ahibouve.
Achapaten gal ahol’uva, sepai hon tamtah tah akhop diu, hiche sepaite hi hung kon’uvin tin, mi apalnat jeng diu, ajot pai paiyuva, akulpi geiya gal asat lutpeh diu ahi.“

Chutah leh lhang gam lengpa jong hung lung hang ding, hung kondoh a sahlam lengpa chutoh kisat lhon ding ahi; aman jong sepai tamtah akhop’a asat ding ahin, ahinla sepai jouse chu aboncha akisatpi pa khut’a lutsoh diu ahi.
Sepaite aboncha amatsoh tengleh alungthima kichoi sanga asang sanga, sang som sangja athagam ding, ahivanga ajo deh lou ding ahibouve.
Ajeh chu sahlam lengpan sepai tampi, amasa a sanga tamjo cheh akhop kit’a, kum phabep nungleh sepai tamtah ahinpuiya neh le chah lhingset’a hung konsuh kit ding ahi.

“Hichepet hileh mi tamtah-in lhanglam lengpa adou diu ahi; namite lah a pumhat jenga thilbol mihon jong nathilmu hi aguilhunna dinga ahu’uva gal asatpeh diu ahi; ahivanga abonchauva alel diu ahibouve.

Chulou tengleh sahlam lengpa hung konin tin, khopi umna pal ahung kaiya, dettah a ki-um pal kikaikhum kulpi umna khopi jeng jong alah ding ahi. Chutah leh lhanglam gama sepaite pang thei lou diu, sepaite lah a lhentum ahat lai lai jong pangjou lou diu ahi, ajeh chu anan jouna dingu tha anei lou diu ahitai.

Koi koi hijongleh amato kidou nom chu acham chama hung kon jeng ding ahin, ahivanga amasanga khatcha jong pang jou lou diu ahi, aman gam loupi tah chu achotphaa agam pumpi chu ama tha neina akoi ding ahitai.

Alenggam pumpi chutoh kimaitoa kihou ding agona, kichamna ding angaito ding, chamna asemdoh ding ahi. Lenggam suhmang nadia jong numeiho chanu apeh ding ahi; ahivanga aman jong phatchomna aneideh lou ding ahibouve.

Abana chu Twikhanglen pang dung gamsunga khu gal kon kit ding, gamsung tampi alah a, hichea hi alouchal jeh a sepai lamkai khat’in achaina asempeh ding ahi, tah beh monga alouchalna chu ama chunga lechuh ding ahiye.
Hichea chu aman agamsung lama kulpi ho ahinjot kit ding, hichea hi kisep lhua lhuden ding, kimudoh lou ding ahitai.

Chutah le ama khel’a hi leng khat hung dingdoh kit’a ama hin lenggam loupina jousea kai dong ding mi asol ding ahi; ahinla lung hang hih hen lang gal kisat hih jongle nikho phabep jou teng ama chu kisugep ding ahitai.“
Ama bana hi mi kidah umtah khat hung leng chang ding ahin, amavang chu lal loupina kipelou ding ahi: gihsalna nei masa louva ama hi hung kona alep lep’a abol’a lenggam chu akilah ding ahiye.
Ama masanga chu sepaite kitheh ngim hel ding, kisugam sit set’uva, kitepna pang milenpa geiya kisumang ding ahi.
Amatoh kihoutohna akisema pat’ a ama hin jou le nal jenga thu aseiya na atoh ding, mihem lhomcha apuiya tha aneidoh ding ahi.

Gihsalna pe masa louva gamsunga gam phapen laitah a jong hung lut ding, apu apaten ahol khah louhel thil jong abol’a, mipi athe thanga, achomgam sit set ding, asuhset’a athilkeo jouseu asuhmang ding ahi. Kulpi det lai lai jouse douna thil agon ding ahin, ahivanga phat chom khat kah a ding bou ahi.

Ama hin lhanglam lengpa douna sepai tampi ahinpuiya atha neisun sun ajedoh a hangtah a hung kon ding, chule lhang gam lengpan jong tha neitah a pang sepaite toh gal anatin’uva anapang diu ahi; ahivanga pang jou ding ahitai, ajeh chu ama suhmangna dia thilgon tampi kigongdoh ahitai.
A-anneh tui tuiya kivahji ho geiya ama suhmangna ding lungthim gel’a pang diu, asepaite kiphet ngim hel ding, mi tamtah kisat chap den ding thigam ding ahiuve.

Leng teni vang chu alung gil’a kijou bolna ding jeng dimset ding, ankong phung khat’a thujou jenga kihou lhona, phatchomna umdeh lou ding, hiche geiya jong hi akichaina ding phat chu akitep pelphat chabou lhung ding ahi.
Agamsung lama nei le gou thilkeo lampi toh hung lhona, ahivanga alungthima kitepna theng chu adou jing ding ahi. Alungdei dei abol’a, chujouleh agamsung lama kile kit ding ahi.
“Aphat kitep alhin teng hung kile kit’a lhanglam gam ajot ding, ahivanga hichea ache hi masanga acheji tobang hilou ding ahi.

Ajeh chu Kittim gama kong inneiho chu amato kisat dia hung kon’uva, chuteng ama kicha ding, kile kit ding ahitai, hichea hi lung hanga kitepna chunga thuset abol ding ahi. Ama hi kile heiyin tin kitepna theng khohsah louho chutoh kihoutoh diu athu’u angai ding ahi.
Aman sepai asoldoh a houin le akulpi asuh thanguva asuh boh diu, tantih neilouva pumgo thilto kibol jong asuh bei ding ahi. Chujongleh sepaiho chun mi gamna thel umtah chu atundoh diu ahiye.
Kitepna kisukeh ho chu muh them kamthema ajol lhah a akiloipi ding, ahivanga Pathen hejing ho chu pangdet chet’uva akisatpi jeng diu ahinai.
Mipi lah a aching hon mi tamtah ahetkhen sah uva, chemjam le meikonga lou diu hihen lang, soh chang kikaiya min achomgam diu hijongleh phat khat tengle hitobanga achuh diu vanga pang pang diu ahi.
Alhuh lham tengu jongleh kithopina neocha beh akimu diu, amaho mi dang tampin jong jou le nal’a muh them kamthema akiloipi diu ahi.
Miching ho lah ami phahep jong kipal lhu’uva, kisuh thengna le kithensona chule kisop ngimna aman’uva, aphat kitepna ahung lhun kah a chu phat beikah a dia hitia hi abol diu ahi.

Chule lengpan jong alungdei deiya abol’a ama le ama jeng jong doi kihou jouse sanga jong kichoi sang ding ahi, chule pathen jouse Pathen douna jong datmo mo thu aseidoh ding ahi. Lung dammona akichai hel kah a ama hi khangtou tou ding ahi; ajeh chu akigongsa chu kiboldoh tei tei ding ahiye.“
Aman apu apate doihou ho chu akhohsah lou ding, numei hon adeipen jong akhohsah lou ding ahi; ama le ama ijakai chunga akichoi sang tah jeh a chu doihou adang akhohsah louhel ding ahi.
Hicheng sanga jong chu kulpi hoa doihou chu ajahol’a, apu apaten ahet khah louhel doihou chu dangka a kisemthu, pathen lim kisahpi chu ajahol joh ding, song mantam le thilpeh lutah tah apeh ding ahi.

Gamdang mite doihou toh pang khoma kulpi det lai lai jouse anokhum ding, ama thang-at tapou chu achoisanga ajabol ding ahi. Hitobang miho chu vaihoma apansah a, mi tamtah chunga thu aneisah ding, gamsung jong aman akilah a ahoppeh peh ding ahi.

“Phat kichai tengleh lhang gam lengpan ama akisatpia, hichea hi sahlam gam lengpan lhang gam lengpa chu ahin no ding, chimpei peiya apeiya, kangtalai tampi leh sakol touthem sepai tampi toh hung kon ding, chule kong innei tampi jong ahinpui ding ahi; gamsung tampi ahinjotpa a, alekhup hel hel’a ajotpai pai ding ahi.

Chule gam loupi tah a hung lut’a, amasanga sepai sang som cheng kijam chap jeng jung ding ahi, hijongleh akhut’a kona mi hijat chu kihuhdoh kit ding ahiuve; Edom ahin, Moab ahin, chule Ammon mite gam lailung chengse ahin, kihuhdoh kit diu ahinai.
Gamsung jouse douna akhut alhah ding ahin, Egypt gamsung jong hoidoh deh lou ding ahi.

Sana le dangka jouse chunga thil kikhol jouse chunga aman vai ahom ding. Egypt gamsunga thil mantam jouse chunga jong vaihoma pang ding ahi; chutengleh Libya mite leh Ethiopia miten ama nung nung ajui diu ahiye.
Amavang niso lam le sahlama kona thu hung kithangin akichatsah a, hijeh a chu mi tamtah thatgam ding leh suhgam soh kei dia ama hung kondoh ding ahi.
Chule aleng ponbuh loupi chu Twikhanglen le Molsang theng loupi tah kikah a ason mat ding, ahivanga akichaina hung lhung tei tei ding ahitan, apanpi ding koimacha umlou ding ahi.

Hiche phat hileh namite chunga thuneiya pang leng chapa loupi pen Michael chu kipatdoh intin, chutengleh gentheina phat khat hung lhung ding ahi, hitobang phat hahsa hi mihem jat hung umdoh a pat hiche phat geiya soh kha loulai hel ahi. Hijongleh hiche phat teng hileh namite chu kihuhdoh tei diu ahinai, lekhabua amin kisun jouse chu aboncha kihuhdoh tei tei ding ahi.“
Chutengleh mihem tamtah leivui lah a kijamsa chu hung thouvun tin, abang bang chu tonsot hinkemlou changuva, abang bangma chu tonsot geiya kijumso ding le vetset’a um dinga hung thou diu ahi.
Hichea koi hileu achingthem ho chu vanthamjol vah banga vah diu, mihem tamtah adih lama heidoh ho jong chu atonsot atonsot geiya ahsite banga vah jing diu ahi.

Hijeh chun Daniel nangman thu hicheng kisei hi khum khan lang, phat kichaina ding hung lhun kah-in mohor nam khumin koitan. Mihem tamtah malam nunglama lhaitouva, hetna hung pungtul tul ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Daniel kitipa keiman kaven ahileh, vetan, michom ni ma ahung ding kit lhonin, khat chu vadung pang lang khat’a adingin, khatpa jong chu vadung pang lang khatma adinge.
Hichun kenjong tupat ponnema kivonpa, vadung twipi chunga dingpa jah a chun kaseiyin. “Hicheng thil kidang ho kichaina ding chu phat itih chan lut ding ham?” katia ahileh;

Vadung twipi chunga ding, tupat ponnem kisilpa chun akhut jetlam le veilamin van lam asangin, ama chu atonsot’a hing jing pa mina akihahsel kajan, hiche hi kum khat, kum ni chule kum keh a ding ahi, ati; chujongleh Mithengte thahat akithecheh soh teng achaina ahung lhun phat leh, thil hijat hi kimolso ding ahi.
Ja chu kaja nan ahivangin kahekhen theipoi. Chuphat’in kenjong kaseiyin, “Vo kapu, thil hijat hung konna ding ipi hiding ham?” tia kadoh leh;
aman aseiyin, “Chetan, Daniel, ajeh chu thu khum khana kibolsoh a, phat kichai kah a dia mohor kinam khumsoh ahitai.
Mi tamtah amaho le amaho kisuthenguva, kisop theng diu, kisop bang diu ahi; chule kisop ngimsel diu ahiye. Migilouten vang ahetkhen thei him him lou diu ahi. Miching hon vang ahetkhen cheh dingu ahi.
Tantih neilouva kibol pumgo thilto akilahdoh a pat le mi bahgama pang thet umtah akitundoh a pat nikho sang khat le ni ja ni toh chule ni somko um nalai ding ahi.
Koi hijongleh nikho sang khat le ni ja thum toh nisom thum le ni nga ngah doh a, hichea hung lut theipa chu nun nom hen,
Ahin phat kichai kah a din chetan, nakicholdoa, nikho jouse kichai nileh nangma din mun dia nakipehna muna chu nadin ding ahi,” ati.
